title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models
hook: Llama 2 gave everyone powerful language models and a recipe for safer AI chats.
promise: You will understand how Llama 2 made open, safe, and capable language models available to all.
prerequisite_note: Familiarity with how AI learns from examples helps, but curiosity about language tools is enough.

glossary.plain: A large AI model trained on broad data, ready for many tasks.
Adjusting a pre-trained model on specific data to specialize it.
A training method where humans guide the model’s responses.
Extra training steps to reduce harmful or biased outputs.
Making the model’s parameters available for anyone to use or study.
A model adjusted to handle conversational tasks, like chatbots.

cards.title: Open, Safer Language Models
body: Discover how Llama 2 opened up powerful language models and made chatbots safer for everyone.

cards.title: How AI Models Became More Open
body: Imagine if anyone could use a top-tier language model, not just big companies. Llama 2 made this possible for researchers and developers everywhere.
But simply releasing a model is not enough. Llama 2 also shared how to make these models safer for real-world conversations.

cards.title: From Foundation to Safer Chatbots
body: Llama 2 starts as a foundation model, trained on vast data. It is then fine-tuned with specific techniques to become a safe, conversational AI.
The process flows from collecting data, training a general model, then fine-tuning it for chat and safety using feedback and special datasets.
cards.caption: The journey: train a broad model, refine it for chat, ensure safety, and open it to all.

cards.title: What Changes When Models Are Open and Tuned for Safety?
body: See how language models differ when they are closed and generic versus open and safety-tuned.
cards.offNote: Few can use them, and harmful outputs are more likely.
cards.onNote: Many can access them, and they are trained to avoid unsafe responses.

cards.title: A Recipe for Open and Responsible AI
body: Llama 2’s central idea is to release both the models and the detailed steps for making them safe to use in chat.
By combining open access with transparent safety tuning, Llama 2 lets the world build on strong language technology while reducing risks.

cards.title: How Does Safety Tuning Affect Model Usefulness?
body: Adjust the slider to see how more or less safety tuning changes the chatbot's behavior.
cards.low: Model may give risky or harmful responses, but answers are unfiltered.
cards.mid: Model avoids most unsafe outputs, but still gives helpful answers.
cards.high: Model is very cautious, but may refuse some valid requests.

cards.title: What Goes Into an Open, Safe Chat Model?
body: Pick the ingredients that Llama 2 used to build safer, open chatbots.

choices.label: Large-scale text data
choices.note: Provides broad knowledge and language skills.

choices.label: Supervised fine-tuning
choices.note: Helps the model learn to follow instructions.

choices.label: Human feedback (RLHF)
choices.note: Guides the model toward preferred answers.

choices.label: Safety-specific data
choices.note: Teaches the model to avoid unsafe outputs.

choices.label: Open model weights
choices.note: Lets anyone use or improve the model.

choices.label: Transparency in training
choices.note: Shares the process so others can replicate or audit it.

cards.title: Llama 2's Impact: Access, Safety, and Performance
body: Llama 2 models matched or outperformed many closed models on chat benchmarks, while being much more widely available.
Its safety-tuning process led to fewer harmful outputs and set a new standard for openness in language AI.

bars.label: Transparency
bars.note: Training and safety methods are public

cards.caption: Llama 2 raised the bar for open, safe, and strong language models.

cards.title: Why Llama 2 Changed the Game
body: Before Llama 2, only a few had access to advanced language models, and safety recipes were rarely shared.
Llama 2 showed that powerful AI can be open and responsible, inspiring a wave of innovation and transparency.

cards.title: How Llama 2 Works in Four Moves

recap.label: Train
recap.note: Learn from huge, diverse text data.

recap.label: Fine-tune
recap.note: Adjust for chat and specific tasks.

recap.label: Release
recap.note: Share both the models and the recipe openly.

cards.title: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models
body: Read the full details and methodology in the original Llama 2 paper.
